edit.clear_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to discard your narrative writing? This cannot be undone.
edit.restructure_like_result: Do you like the end result?
edit.restructure_empty_warning: Please write some thoughts first before restructuring.
edit.restructure_no_key_error: Gemini API key is not configured. Please add your key in Account Settings.
edit.polish_empty_warning: Please write some thoughts first before polishing.

detail.gemini_not_configured: Gemini API key is not configured. Please add your key in the Settings

account.title: Settings
account.gemini_api_key_hint: Enter API Key from Google AI Studio
account.writing_style_desc: Configure the Gemini restructuring prompt and reference articles to emulate your targeted writing style.

backup_restore.title: Backup & Restore
backup_restore.desc: Export all your Towi notes to a markdown ZIP archive, or import notes from markdown files.

about.title: About
about.description: TowiTowi is a note-taking application inspired by the Towitowi bird of Nias (Orthotomus ruficeps baeus). According to local lore, when the Towitowi bird chirps, it brings good news. We hope that writing and sharing your Towi notes brings happiness and good news to you and your community.

onboarding.intro_desc: TowiTowi is a note-taking app that also works as your daily journal. Jot down your fleeting thoughts or write deep entries.
onboarding.gemini_desc: Need a little help to give structure to your fleeting thoughts or to share your thoughts with the world? Click on the Gemini button and see the magic happen.
onboarding.customize_desc: Adjust the writing style by providing your own article sample. Gemini will learn your style and help restructure your notes in your own style. For this to work, please enter your Gemini API key.
onboarding.lore_desc: The name TowiTowi is taken from the Nias bird towi-towi (Orthotomus ruficeps baeus). According to local lore, when the towi-towi bird chirps, it brings good news.
onboarding.lore_question: We hope that your Towi notes brings good news to you and the world. Have you towi-ed yet? Start towi-ing now!
